creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 255399
numpy-2.1.3p1.diff.txt

I regenerate the patch into one file, it include:
1) new port math/py-numpy1
2) add py-numpy1 to math/Makefile
3) modify Mk/Uses/python, make PYNUMPY depends on math/py-numpy1
4) Update math/py-numpy to 2.1.3
5) fix math/py-pandas, math/py-numexpr, math/py-bottleneck
